name: CAPSTONE COMPANIES, INC.
summary: Capstone Companies, Inc. (CAPC) is a Florida corporation that was a designer, promoter, and licensor of consumer products aimed at simplifying daily living through technology. Its product history includes LED lighting products, Smart Mirror (Connected Surfaces), and the Connected Chef kitchen tablet. As of filing, CAPC has no revenue-generating operations and is pursuing a new business line, with a promissory note investment in e-mobility company eBliss Global, Inc.
